title: Backup Validator — DR Test Automation & Geographic Redundancy Verification
description: backup_validator.py tracks backup jobs, RPO/RTO, DR plans, DR test results, geographic redundancy, and business continuity scoring (0-100). test_backup_validator.py validates the full stack. Gap: DR test scheduling is tracked but not automated — tests must be manually initiated. Geographic redundancy tracking records locations but does not verify that a backup actually exists at the secondary location.
missing: DR test automation: scheduled quarterly DR test that spins up a restore in a temp environment, verifies data integrity, and records the result automatically
Geographic redundancy verification: ping the secondary backup location and verify the backup file exists and matches the SHA-256 checksum
RTO/RPO breach alerting: when actual RTO exceeds target RTO during a DR test, fire a P1 PagerDuty alert and create a remediation finding
